title: aceras anthropophorum f. angustatum
intro: Aceras anthropophorum f. angustatum, also known as the man orchid or Orchis anthropophorum, is a species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aceras anthropophorum f. angustatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cold symptoms, and ease respiratory congestion. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its roots and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in ointments and salves.
